episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 524: Marvel & Hobbit Previews
episode.description:
Your favorite cardboard finance team gets you caught on all the Magic the Gathering card price action of the week, including meta updates, cards to watch and detailed chatter about the recent Pro Tour results and the early Marvel/Hobbit previews.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
